subtitle.en: opal is hydrated silica with ~250 nm spheres self-assembled into a close-packed lattice; viewing angle shifts the Bragg condition and the stone flashes a different colour
subtitle.ko: 오팔은 ~250 nm 실리카 구가 close-packed 격자 — 시야각이 Bragg 조건 바꿔 색 flash

description.en: Opal stone with flash patches that update angle-dependent. Slider tunes viewing angle from 0 to 70°; flashed colour sweeps red → blue.
description.ko: 오팔 스톤 + flash 패치, 각도 의존. 슬라이더로 0-70° 시야각 → 적·청 색 sweep.
